name: Vegetable Beef Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 lb stew meat or chuck roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the stew meat or chuck roast into reasonably sized pieces.
2. In a large pot, combine all ingredients except the frozen mixed vegetables.
3. Add enough water to cover the contents.
4. Cook on low or medium-low heat, allowing it to simmer for 2-3 hours.
5. Add the package of frozen mixed vegetables.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes at medium heat.
8. Serve with bread and butter, along with chilled rose wine.
